title: Simple&CleanUi
description: This resource pack is inspired by the Sodiums mods UI for every meny apart from any type of contaner/inventory sadly this is due to a bug with transparent colors in contaners MC-267021.
body:
This is a resource pack that adds a simple and clean ui to every part of your menus, sadly it dosen't work in contaners because a bug MC-267021.
In the future if Mojang fixes this bug I'll update the resource pack so it work on contaners.
Right now this resource pack is only for vanilla but if alot of people like it I'll update if for some mods too!
